title: Bloomings 3D swords
description: Turns all sword typed to a 3D Custom Model Created by BloomingCow3665
body:
A simple resource pack that remodle all vanilla swords. Designed to stay close to the default Minecraft style while improving visual variety.

## Features

- 3D models for all sword types
- Vanilla-style textures
- No mods or OptiFine required
- Works in survival and creative
